description: From the manufacturer Hozelock Lance Spray Plus 90 Long Reach Watering with added comfort, perfect for hanging baskets. Hozelock Lance Spray Plus 90 The Hozelock Lance Spray Plus ensures that every area of the garden is watered to perfection, due to its ability to extend. This lance is light weight, yet robust and is packed with useful features. Key Benefits Include: Long reach handle of 90cm Adjustable head angle that provides convenience for watering plants at different heights Five spray patterns for general gardening and cleaning tasks Lockable on/off flow control for continuous spraying Long Reach Handle This lance 50% lighter than its predecessor and it has a long reach handle that is 90cm in length. Adjustable Spray Head This lance features a 180° adjustable spray head for even more convenient watering at different heights. Lockable Variable Flow Trigger The Lance Spray Plus 90 has a lockable variable flow trigger & separate flow control for control during watering, saving you up to 50% of water waste. 5 Spray Patterns Cone Spray (1) , Powerful Jet (2) , Fast Fill (3) , Rose Spray (4) , Fan Spray (5) Multi Spray Gun Multi Spray Gun Pro Ultra Twist Flexi Spray Lance Spray Plus 90 Telescopic Lance Spray Plus 140 Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 17,447 4.0 out of 5 stars 944 4.0 out of 5 stars 215 4.6 out of 5 stars 503 — — Price £17.50 £ 17 . 50 — no data £19.84 £ 19 . 84 £37.64 £ 37 . 64 — no data — no data Number Of Spray Patterns 5 7 3 3 5 7 Spray Patterns Jet, Cone, Fast Fill, Flat Spray, Fine Rose Jet, Cone, Fast Fill, Fan, Mist, Fine Rose, Aerated Rose, Fast Fill, Jet Rose, Fast Fill, Jet Cone, Fan, Fast Fill, Fine Rose, Jet Aerated, Cone, Fan, Fast Fill, Fine Rose, Jet, Mist Function Spray Gun Spray Gun Spray Gun, Sprinkler Spray Gun, Sprinkler Long Reach Watering Long Reach Watering Lockable On/Off Trigger ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Material Plastic Metal Plastic Plastic Plastic Plastic
